# Billing Module — LLM Context

> Complete context for the billing system. For integration patterns see `docs/BILLING-ENGINE.md`.

## Overview

Hybrid billing via Paystack: recurring subscriptions + variable per-usage charges. Currency: ZAR, 15% VAT inclusive. Provider switchable: Mock (dev) or Paystack (prod) via `Billing:Provider` config.

## File Structure

```
src/Modules/Billing/
├── BillingModule.cs
├── Controllers/
│   └── PaystackWebhookController.cs
├── DTOs/
│   ├── PaystackRequests.cs
│   ├── PaystackResponses.cs
│   └── PaystackWebhookPayload.cs
├── Entities/
│   ├── AddOn.cs, BillingProfile.cs, Discount.cs, Invoice.cs
│   ├── InvoiceLineItem.cs, Payment.cs, Plan.cs, PlanPricingTier.cs
│   ├── Subscription.cs, TenantAddOn.cs, TenantCredit.cs
│   ├── TenantDiscount.cs, UsageRecord.cs, WebhookEvent.cs
├── Models/
│   └── PaystackOptions.cs
└── Services/
    ├── AddOnService.cs, CreditService.cs, DiscountService.cs
    ├── DunningService.cs, InvoiceEngine.cs, InvoiceGenerator.cs
    ├── PaystackBillingService.cs, PaystackClient.cs
    ├── PaystackPlanSyncService.cs, PaystackSubscriptionSyncService.cs
    ├── SeatBillingService.cs, UsageBillingService.cs
    ├── UsageMeteringService.cs, VariableChargeService.cs
    └── WebhookSignatureValidator.cs
```

## Core Entities

### Plan
`Id`, `Name`, `Slug`, `Description`, `MonthlyPrice`, `AnnualPrice`, `Currency`("ZAR"), `BillingModel`(FlatRate/PerSeat/UsageBased/Hybrid), `IncludedSeats`, `PerSeatMonthlyPrice`, `PerSeatAnnualPrice`, `SetupFee`, `TrialDays`, `MaxUsers`, `MaxRequestsPerMinute`, `IsActive`, `SortOrder`, `PaystackMonthlyPlanCode`, `PaystackAnnualPlanCode`. Nav: `PlanFeatures`, `PricingTiers`, `Tenants`. Computed: `IsFreePlan`.

### Subscription
`Id`, `TenantId`, `PlanId`, `Status`(Active/PastDue/Cancelled/Expired/Trialing/NonRenewing/PendingPayment), `BillingCycle`(Monthly/Annual), `StartDate`, `EndDate`, `NextBillingDate`, `CancelledAt`, `TrialEndsAt`, `GracePeriodEndsAt`, `Quantity`(seats), `PaystackSubscriptionCode`, `PaystackCustomerCode`, `PaystackAuthorizationCode`, `PaystackEmailToken`, `PaystackAuthorizationEmail`, `ConcurrencyStamp`.

### Invoice
`Id`, `TenantId`, `SubscriptionId`, `InvoiceNumber`, `Status`(Draft/Issued/Paid/Overdue/Cancelled/Refunded/PartiallyRefunded), `Subtotal`, `DiscountAmount`, `TaxAmount`, `TaxRate`, `CreditApplied`, `Total`, `Currency`, `IssuedDate`, `DueDate`, `PaidDate`, `BillingPeriodStart`, `BillingPeriodEnd`, company snapshots, `Description`, `PaystackReference`. Nav: `LineItems`, `Payment`.

### InvoiceLineItem
`Id`, `InvoiceId`, `Type`(Subscription/Seat/UsageCharge/AddOn/SetupFee/OneOff/Discount/Credit/Tax/Proration), `Description`, `Quantity`, `UnitPrice`, `Amount`, `AddOnId`, `UsageMetric`, `SortOrder`.

### Payment
`Id`, `TenantId`, `InvoiceId`, `Amount`, `Currency`, `Status`(Pending/Success/Failed/Refunded/PartiallyRefunded), `PaystackReference`, `PaystackTransactionId`, `GatewayResponse`, `TransactionDate`.

### BillingProfile
`TenantId`, `CompanyName`, `BillingAddress`, `City`, `Province`, `PostalCode`, `Country`("ZA"), `VatNumber`, `BillingEmail`.

### UsageRecord
`Id`, `TenantId`, `Metric`, `Quantity`, `PeriodStart`, `PeriodEnd`.

### Other Entities
- `AddOn` — purchasable add-ons (OneOff/Monthly/Annual billing)
- `TenantAddOn` — tenant ↔ add-on binding
- `Discount` — percentage or fixed amount codes with expiry/redemption limits
- `TenantDiscount` — applied discount with remaining cycles
- `TenantCredit` — credits (PlanChangeCredit/Refund/Manual/Promotional)
- `WebhookEvent` — idempotent webhook processing log
- `PlanPricingTier` — tiered pricing (min/max units, price per unit)

## IBillingService Interface

Primary service interface (in `src/Shared/IBillingService.cs`):

| Category | Methods |
|----------|---------|
| Subscriptions | `InitializeSubscriptionAsync`, `GetSubscriptionStatusAsync`, `CancelSubscriptionAsync`, `ChangePlanAsync`, `PreviewPlanChangeAsync` |
| Seats | `UpdateSeatCountAsync`, `PreviewSeatChangeAsync` |
| Charges | `ChargeOneOffAsync`, `ChargeVariableAsync` |
| Refunds | `IssueRefundAsync` |
| Discounts | `ApplyDiscountAsync` |
| Usage | `ProcessUsageBillingAsync` |
| Gateway Sync | `SyncPlansAsync`, `UpdatePlanInGatewayAsync`, `ReconcileSubscriptionsAsync` |
| Webhooks | `ProcessWebhookAsync`, `VerifyAndLinkSubscriptionAsync` |
| Portal | `GetManageLinkAsync`, `GetBillingDashboardAsync` |

## Key Services

### PaystackBillingService (1590 lines)
Primary billing implementation. Handles subscription init (free path vs Paystack checkout), webhook processing, plan changes with proration, seat updates, cancellation, refunds.

### VariableChargeService
Orchestrates variable billing at renewal time:
1. Calculate seat charges (beyond `Plan.IncludedSeats`, tiered pricing via `PlanPricingTier`)
2. Calculate usage charges (delegates to `IUsageBillingService`)
3. Generate invoice via `IInvoiceEngine.GenerateProrationInvoiceAsync`
4. Charge via `PaystackClient.ChargeAuthorizationAsync`
5. Handle outcomes: success → Payment record; 2FA challenge → redirect URL; failure → dunning

### InvoiceEngine
Generates invoices with line items, applies discounts and credits, calculates tax.

### DunningService
Retries failed payments: configurable attempts (default 3), interval (default 72h), grace period tracking.

### UsageBillingService / UsageMeteringService
Records usage metrics, calculates overage charges per `Billing:UsageMetrics` config.

### PaystackClient
HTTP client for Paystack API. Key methods: `InitializeTransactionAsync`, `ChargeAuthorizationAsync`, `CreatePlanAsync`, `CreateSubscriptionAsync`, `CancelSubscriptionAsync`, `IssueRefundAsync`. `ChargeAuthorizationAsync` is `virtual` for test overrides.

## Webhook Flow

```
POST /api/webhooks/paystack
  → Validate x-paystack-signature (HMAC SHA-512)
  → Store WebhookEvent (idempotency check)
  → Route by event type:
     charge.success    → Create/update Invoice + Payment
     charge.failed     → Enter grace period, start dunning
     subscription.disable → Cancel subscription
     transfer.success  → Process refund
```

## Subscription Lifecycle

```
Trialing → Active → PastDue → Suspended → Cancelled
                  ↘ NonRenewing → Cancelled/Expired
```

## Background Jobs

| Job | Schedule | Purpose |
|-----|----------|---------|
| `BillingReconciliationJob` | Daily 2 AM | Sync Paystack state |
| `UsageBillingJob` | Daily 1 AM | Process metered usage charges |
| `DunningJob` | Hourly | Retry failed payments |
| `ExpiredTrialJob` | Daily 6 AM | Handle expired trials |
| `DiscountExpiryJob` | Daily 4 AM | Expire past-due discounts |

## Configuration

```json
{
  "Billing": {
    "Provider": "Mock|Paystack",
    "Currency": "ZAR",
    "Paystack": { "SecretKey", "PublicKey", "WebhookSecret", "CallbackBaseUrl" },
    "Tax": { "Rate": 0.15, "Label": "VAT", "Included": true },
    "Company": { "Name", "Address", "VatNumber" },
    "Invoice": { "Prefix": "INV", "PaymentTermDays": 7 },
    "Trial": { "DefaultDays": 14 },
    "GracePeriod": { "Days": 3, "DunningAttempts": 3, "DunningIntervalHours": 72 },
    "Features": { "AnnualBilling", "PerSeatBilling", "UsageBilling", "AddOns", "Discounts", "SetupFees" },
    "UsageMetrics": { "metric_name": { "DisplayName", "OveragePrice", "IncludedByPlan": {} } }
  }
}
```

## Testing

Tests in `tests/saas.UnitTests/Billing/`:
- `BillingServiceTests.cs` — subscription lifecycle, plan changes
- `InvoiceEngineTests.cs` — invoice generation, discounts, credits, tax
- `DunningServiceTests.cs` — payment retry logic
- `VariableChargeServiceTests.cs` — seat + usage + charge flow
- `DiscountServiceTests.cs` — discount application
- `UsageBillingServiceTests.cs` — usage charge calculation
- `SeatBillingServiceTests.cs` — seat-based billing

Pattern: in-memory SQLite, private stubs for PaystackClient (virtual methods), behavioral flags for failure simulation.
